title: Milkdown WYSIWYG editor component with collaborative features
purpose: Provides a rich text editor with markdown support, collaborative editing capabilities, and custom node views for diagrams and details sections.
module_context: Exports a React component that wraps the Milkdown editor with additional features like autosave, annotations, and custom node views. Uses React context for project/session data and manages editor lifecycle with hooks.

steps.content: Access the project and session data from the context.
Return the project and session values from the context.
Render the DetailsView component.
Access the node and selected state from the node view context.
Read the selected project from the project store.
Read the current session from the session store.
Extract the kind and refId attributes from the node.
Render the DiagramEmbedView component with project, session, kind, refId, and selected props.
Create a node view factory using the prosemirror adapter.
Capture the initial autosave delay value to prevent plugin recreation.
Memoize the diagram embed view component with the node view factory.
Memoize the image view component with the node view factory.
Memoize the details view component with the node view factory.
Memoize the heading view component with the node view factory.
Create a milkdown plugin for annotations that updates the prose plugins context.
Build the complete plugins array including core plugins, custom plugins, and node views.
Initialize the milkdown editor with the configured plugins and initial markdown.
Bridge the React collapsible sections context to the PM heading-collapse plugin.
Emit telemetry data when the editor mounts.
Fire the onReady callback once the ProseMirror editor view is available.
Set up imperative handle methods for setting markdown and getting the editor view.
Create a ref for the host element.
Read the selected project from the project store.
Read the current session from the session store.
Create a context value with project and session data.
Create refs for onChange, onPersist, editable, annotations, and onReady callbacks.
Update the onChange ref on prop changes.
Update the onPersist ref with telemetry data.
Update the editable ref on prop changes and trigger a view update if needed.
Update the annotations ref on prop changes.
Update the onReady ref on prop changes.
Set up forwarding of the inner editor handle through a local ref.
Dispatch the latest annotations to the PM plugin when props change.
Render the Milkdown editor with provider components and context.
Store the received handle in the inner handle ref.
Forward the handle to the outer ref if it's a function.
Forward the handle to the outer ref if it's a mutable ref object.

methods.name: emitTelemetry
methods.normalized_params: ({ editor_variant, timestamp, autosave_latency_ms }: { editor_variant: string; timestamp: number; autosave_latency_ms?: number }): void

steps.content: Send telemetry data about the editor variant and timestamp.
Include autosave latency if available.
Return the current timestamp in milliseconds.
